themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Theological Analysis: This passage falls within the section on Proper ark transport - Levitic...". Word-study detail reinforces "בְּרִית: of the covenant - a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)".
